basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Indore Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per DST/Institute norms. Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India norms.
age_limit.details: As per DST/Institute norms. Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E./Master's degree for JRF, Ph.D. and/or Master's degree for SRF. GATE score preferred. Experience for SRF.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.Tech./B.E./Master's degree in Electronics/ Electronics and Communication Engineering/ Optoelectronics/ Microwave engineering/ Electrical Engineering/ Computer Science or equivalent, preferably with a GATE score. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Ph.D. and/or Master's degree in Electronics/ Electronics and Communication Engineering/ Optoelectronics/ Microwave engineering/ Electrical Engineering/ Computer Science or equivalent, preferably with a GATE score.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): 37000 p.m. + 20% HRA Senior Research Fellow (SRF): 42000 p.m. + 20% HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Indore Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Indore recruitment is 17th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for JRF and SRF posts?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position, a B.Tech./B.E./Master's degree is required. For the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position, a Ph.D. and/or Master's degree is necessary. A GATE score is preferred for both.

faq.question: Q3. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow positions at IIT Indore will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for JRF and SRF positions?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) will receive a stipend of 37000 p.m. plus 20% HRA. The Senior Research Fellow (SRF) will receive a stipend of 42000 p.m. plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates will be provided as per the norms set by DST/Institute and the Government of India.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Interested candidates need to send their detailed CV and other required documents to the specified email addresses.

faq.question: Q7. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) for project-based positions in the Department of Electrical Engineering.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project for which these positions are being advertised?
faq.answer: These positions are for the project titled "Quantum Internet with Local Access (QuILA)" under the National Quantum Mission.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any other posts advertised besides JRF and SRF?
faq.answer: Yes, the notification also mentions a vacancy for a Project Engineer, though specific qualification details for this role are not provided in the summary.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
